description: Parallel execution plan to close all identified gaps in PRD-v2/v3 implementation
prerequisites: Git repository is clean and committed
Current implementation passes all existing tests
Development environment ready (TypeScript, PHP, WordPress test setup)

strands.name: Feature Implementation: AI Translation & A11Y Scanner

tasks.title: Implement AI-powered batch string translation
tasks.description: Replace placeholder in translation.ts with actual AI-powered batch translation via FaiGate integration.
acceptanceCriteria: translate_strings tool accepts string arrays and target language
Integration with FaiGate config from ~/.elementify/config.json
Returns translation results with confidence scores
Handles batch translation with progress reporting
Governance level L2 (auto-queue) as per product-tiers.ts
steps: 2. Design FaiGate integration for batch string translation
3. Implement translate_strings tool with proper error handling
4. Add corresponding PHP endpoint if needed
5. Update product-tiers.ts if new tool name is different
6. Write tests for the new functionality
7. Verify integration with WPML/Polylang string tables

tasks.title: Implement built-in accessibility scanner
tasks.description: Build the built-in accessibility scanner referenced as TODO in Ally.php.
acceptanceCriteria: New tool scan_accessibility (Free tier) implemented
Scanner detects missing alt text, heading hierarchy issues, low color contrast
Returns structured violations with severity levels
Integration with existing ally.ts tools
Can run independently of Elementor Ally plugin
steps: 2. Design basic WCAG scanner for Elementor data

tasks.title: Confirm booking integration release readiness
tasks.description: Verify booking.ts implementation and update roadmap.
acceptanceCriteria: Review booking.ts tools for completeness
Test booking tools with mock data
Update ROADMAP.md to change 'Planned Integration' to 'Implemented'
Ensure booking tools are properly registered in product-tiers.ts
Verify plugin-side API endpoints exist
steps: 1. Review booking.ts implementation for all planned tools
3. Run existing tests or create simple validation tests
4. Verify ROADMAP.md already updated (should be done)
5. Check product-tiers.ts for booking tool registrations

tasks.title: Fix wizards cached assessment placeholder
tasks.description: Replace placeholder assessment data in Wizards.php with actual cached assess_site data.
acceptanceCriteria: Wizards use actual assess_site cached data instead of placeholder
All 7 wizards (ACF, Forms, Comments, etc.) receive proper assessment input
Wizard recommendations are based on real site state
Backward compatibility maintained for sites without cached data
steps: 2. Design caching mechanism for assess_site results
3. Modify Wizards.php to fetch cached assessment
4. Update client.ts to support wizard assessment data
5. Test with actual site assessment data

tasks.title: Add missing export tools
tasks.description: Implement export tools for Import-Export module.
acceptanceCriteria: New tool mass_export implemented in import-export.ts
Supports filtering by post_type, category, date range, status
Output formats: CSV and JSON
Governance level L2 (auto-queue for large exports)
Integration with existing import_external_data tool
steps: 1. Design mass_export tool interface and parameters
3. Add corresponding PHP endpoint in ImportExport.php

tasks.title: Implement mirror-export verification for public Free repository
tasks.description: Create verification system for mirror export to ensure Free tier tools are correctly separated from Advanced.
acceptanceCriteria: Script to verify mirror export contains only Free tier tools
Check product-tiers.ts consistency between main repo and mirror
Automated validation in CI pipeline
Documentation for mirror maintenance process
steps: 1. Design verification script that checks tool tiers

successCriteria: All 6 tasks from prd-remaining.json marked as completed
No remaining TODOs in source code for PRD-v2/v3 modules
Roadmap accurately reflects current implementation status
postCompletion: Run full test suite: npm test && composer test
